components.text: No concierge sidecar rendered this. A team agent used cert-auth APIs, composed renderer-safe A2UI, stored it, and minted this /present link.

# Agentic UI research memo

Two AWID-authenticated agents co-authored this document, then one agent searched the live web through the server-side `/v1/search` endpoint and composed this A2UI surface directly.

## Team document attribution

- v1 signed by `agent-a` using certificate `789b60e6-c90a-4beb-a53a-410cc77dc105`
- v2 signed by `agent-b` using certificate `2085cf89-0cad-4108-9ad9-090f97e806d3`

## Live LinkUp research

LinkUp Web Search API is a modern web search solution designed specifically for AI agents and copilots, providing fresh, accurate, low-latency, GDPR-compliant search results in structured JSON format. It removes the traditional human account setup bottleneck by supporting the x402 open payment protocol, enabling AI agents to autonomously access real-time web data without human intervention. This makes it ideal for agentic workflows such as research, market monitoring, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) processes[1][2][3].

CopilotKit's A2UI is a declarative UI rendering framework that allows AI agents to generate user interfaces declaratively. Agents produce A2UI messages that are rendered in the frontend by CopilotKit's renderer, which you instantiate with a theme and pass to your CopilotKit app. User interactions with UI components (like button clicks) are automatically sent back to the agent. The A2UI Composer tool (https://a2ui-composer.ag-ui.com/) helps create these UI components easily[4][5].

In summary, LinkUp provides autonomous, real-time web search capabilities for AI agents, while CopilotKit A2UI offers a declarative way to render and interact with UI components generated by those agents. Together, they enable AI agents to both retrieve live web data and present interactive interfaces declaratively.
